headline: Enphase Expands U.S. Commercial Reach With GaN Microinverters And Valuation Gap
summary: Enphase Energy expanded its U.S. commercial microinverter product line, including a new GaN powered three phase microinverter. The new products are designed to align with domestic manufacturing requirements and support access to U.S. federal incentives. The move targets both new commercial solar installations and repowering projects in the U.S. market. For investors watching NasdaqGM:ENPH, the focus has often been on its residential exposure and share price moves. The stock closed at...
